title: Amtech F1735 5 Piece hex shank wood drill bit set
features: DURABLE: This 5 piece hex shank wood drill bit set has sharp carbon steel brad tips for accurate drilling
VERSATILE: With a 6.25mm (1/4") hex drive with a quick-release shank, the set includes sizes: 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm and 10mm
SIZE CAPACITY: 4 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: From the manufacturer 5pc hex shank wood drill bit set Set includes sizes: 4, 5, 6, 8 and 10mm 1/4″ hex shank Fits all 1/4″ hex cordless screwdrivers
